hook.text: RASHFORD SET TO RETURN AS WINDOW OPENS TOMORROW

beats.text: BAYERN MUNICH ARE NOW UNLIKELY TO PURSUE HIM
RASHFORD IS RESIGNED TO RETURNING TO CARRINGTON
CARRICK HAS NOT RULED OUT KEEPING RASHFORD AT UNITED

caption: The Rashford saga takes its final turn — for now 🔴 Barcelona passed on their £26m buy option. Bayern Munich made calls but are now unlikely to follow through. Rashford is reportedly resigned to returning to Carrington for pre-season, and Carrick hasn't ruled out keeping him. Window opens tomorrow. Per Sky Sports / Fabrizio Romano. What do you want to happen? 🔴 REPORTED — per Sky Sports / Fabrizio Romano.
